meta.title: MyQuickPaste - One-Click Paste for Your Saved Text
meta.description: Tired of copy-pasting the same text over and over? MyQuickPaste sits in the corner of your screen for instant one-click pasting. Lightweight and free on the Microsoft Store.

hero.catch: Save your frequent texts. Paste with a single click.

features.label: 1-Click Paste
features.text: Drop your AI prompts or email templates instantly into any app without switching your screens.

features.label: Instant Register
features.text: Copy any text from anywhere and register it into your slots immediately with zero friction.

features.label: 100% Local Storage
features.text: Perfect for sensitive login IDs. Your data is encrypted locally on your PC and never touches the cloud.

features.label: Ultra-Slim UI
features.text: Completely fixed at 200px wide. A clean, compact design with zero learning curve for first-time users.

hero.ctaSecondary: Try all Pro features free for 14 days
hero.trust: Microsoft Store certified · Data encrypted locally on your PC
hero.screenshotAlt: MyQuickPaste: click a slot to paste the full saved text. Setup once in Edit.
hero.headline1: Sits quietly in the corner of your screen, ready for instant typing.
hero.headline2: Pure productivity. A dead-simple, ultra-focused desktop companion.

problem.title: Sound familiar?
items: Constantly hunting for the same AI prompts (ChatGPT, etc.) every single day
Retyping the same standard greetings and canned replies in emails or chats over and over
Wasting time copying multiple login IDs or Excel formulas from messy Notepad files
problem.solution: With MyQuickPaste (MQP), you only register it once. Paste your texts instantly from a slim window nestled in the corner of your screen.

items.title: Dead-Simple UI
items.text: No manual needed. We stripped away the bloat to create a straightforward layout that anyone can master in seconds.

items.title: Always Within Reach
items.text: Stays perfectly on top without blocking your work. No more tedious alt-tabbing just to copy and paste.

items.title: Seamless Registration
items.text: Save your freshly copied text into a slot right away. We minimized the effort needed to organize your snippets.

items.title: Text Slots
items.text: Organize everything across tabs A–E. Free version includes 10 slots, expandable with Pro.

items.title: Clipboard History
items.text: Automatically logs your last 20 copies (Pro). Recall your past clips in a flash.

items.title: Quick Transforms
items.text: Insert current dates, timestamps, or change text cases with a single tap before pasting.

items.title: 22-Language Support
items.text: Full interface support for 22 languages, including English and Japanese.

items.title: Account & Multiple ID Management
items.text: Keep your work and personal login IDs organized and paste them instantly without manual typing.

items.title: Online Game Chats
items.text: Drop standard greetings or team callouts instantly without losing your focus during intense gameplay.

items.title: Business & Admin Work
items.text: Eliminate the time spent searching for email templates, signatures, and long AI instructions.

items.title: Anyone Who Types Daily
items.text: Free yourself from the daily chore of repetitive typing starting today.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.note: The base app is entirely free. The Pro version is available as a secure Microsoft Store add-on.

cta.title: Stop Wasting Time on Repetitive Typing
cta.lead: Installs in just a few minutes. Start for free and unlock the full potential of your daily workflow.

footer.copyright: Copyright © 2025–2026 Good Rabbit inc., Japan. All rights reserved.

supportPage.title: Support
supportPage.faq1Q: What is the difference between the free and Pro versions?
supportPage.faq1A: The free version supports up to 10 slots. Pro (a one-time Store add-on) unlocks expanded slots, clipboard history, import/export, and more. You can try all Pro features free for 14 days.
supportPage.faq2A: Open the in-app "Upgrade to Pro" option to launch the Microsoft Store purchase page.

releaseNotesPage.title: Release Notes
v3029Items: Fixed trial display issue after add-on purchase

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.overviewText: MyQuickPaste is a Windows application provided by Good Rabbit inc.
privacyPage.dataText: Saved snippets, settings, and history are stored locally on your PC (e.g. %AppData%\MyQuickPaste). Your data is never transmitted outside your computer.
privacyPage.storeText: Pro purchases and license verification are handled by Microsoft Store.
